operational_knowledge_units.title: Aveva API initialize tote request accepts BarcodeID, StationID, and ToteID
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Aveva API page provides an interface to initialize a tote for processing in the system using BarcodeID, StationID, and ToteID.
observed_evidence: Slide text states: "This interface allows users to initialize a tote for processing within the system by specifying key information (BarcodeID, StationID, ToteID)."
Slide title: "Initialize Tote / Aveva API page"
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Aveva API Initialize Tote page lets users initialize a tote for processing by entering BarcodeID, StationID, and ToteID.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Initialize Tote page includes request button and response field
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The page contains a button that sends the tote initialization command and a Response field that displays the result returned by the system.
observed_evidence: Slide text states: "Request to Initialize Tote"
Slide text states: "This button sends a command to the system to initialize the tote with the provided details."
Slide text states: "Upon clicking, the system processes the request and displays the response in the \"Response\" field."
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Initialize Tote UI on the Aveva API page has a Request to Initialize Tote button that sends the initialization command and a Response field that shows the result.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Initialize Tote response indicates success confirmation or error message
operational_knowledge_units.summary: After an initialize tote request is processed, the Response field shows either a confirmation message for success or an error message for failure.
observed_evidence: Slide text states: "Displays the result of the initialization request."
Slide text states: "If successful, this field will show a confirmation message."
Slide text states: "If the initialization fails, it will display an error message."
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: The Initialize Tote Response field displays the result of the request, showing a confirmation message on success or an error message if initialization fails.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Initialize a tote from the Aveva API page
preconditions: BarcodeID, StationID, and ToteID values are available
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide-level screenshot for the Initialize Tote / Aveva API page describing required fields, request button, and response field behavior.

steps.instruction: Enter the required tote initialization information: BarcodeID, StationID, and ToteID.
steps.expected_outcome: The initialize tote request details are populated in the interface.
steps.validation_check: All three values needed by the page are specified.
steps.visual_region_hint: Initialize Tote form fields for BarcodeID, StationID, and ToteID on the Aveva API page

steps.instruction: Click the "Request to Initialize Tote" button.
steps.expected_outcome: The system sends the tote initialization command using the provided details.
steps.validation_check: The request is submitted from the page.

steps.instruction: Review the "Response" field for the result of the initialization request.
steps.expected_outcome: The response field shows either a confirmation message or an error message.
steps.validation_check: Successful initialization is indicated by a confirmation message; failed initialization is indicated by an error message.

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: To initialize a tote from the Aveva API page, provide BarcodeID, StationID, and ToteID, click Request to Initialize Tote, and review the Response field for a confirmation or error message.
